nodes.label: graphify merge-graphs
nodes.rationale: Merges multiple graph.json files (cross-repo clones or monorepo subfolders) into one graph; each node carries a repo attribute so results can be filtered by origin.

nodes.label: Monorepo Multi-Subfolder Flow
nodes.rationale: The skill pipeline writes all output to graphify-out/ in the cwd, which would clobber shared output across subfolders, so each subfolder is extracted separately via the CLI (graphify-out/ lands inside the scanned path) and merged at the project root.
